title: T-035 — QA-022 Sampling plans config page + v_inspection_backlog view
prompt:
# T-035 — QA-022 Sampling plans config page + v_inspection_backlog view

PRD: 09-QUALITY-PRD.md §8.2 QA-022, §9.2 v_inspection_backlog, §8.5 prototype sampling_plans
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Create the v_inspection_backlog view (consumed by T-032 list page) AND build `/quality/sampling` config page listing seeded sampling_plans (read-only P1 view + Create custom plan stub).

## Implementation contract
1. Drizzle migration `packages/db/migrations/0123_v_inspection_backlog.sql` creates v_inspection_backlog view per §9.2 verbatim.
2. `apps/web/src/app/quality/sampling/page.tsx` Server Component reads listSamplingPlans (filter by plan_type+inspection_level+aql).
3. shadcn Table 8 columns: Plan code | Type | Inspection level | AQL | Lot range | Sample size | Accept/Reject | Active.
4. Custom plan create stub (button visible only to quality_lead+admin; routing TODO P2 — emits structured event for future).
5. 1:1 parity vs `design/Monopilot Design System/quality/other-screens.jsx:57-114` (sampling_plans).

## Files
- packages/db/migrations/0123_v_inspection_backlog.sql [create]
- apps/web/src/app/quality/sampling/page.tsx [create]
- apps/web/src/server/quality/listSamplingPlans.ts [create]
- apps/web/src/components/quality/sampling/SamplingPlansTable.tsx [create]
- apps/web/src/components/quality/sampling/__tests__/samplingPlans.test.tsx [create]
- design/Monopilot Design System/quality/other-screens.jsx [ref]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given migration 0123 applied, when SELECT FROM v_inspection_backlog runs, then the view returns rows with status IN (pending, assigned, in_progress) and computed urgency column ('overdue'|'urgent'|'normal') per §9.2 logic
2. Given the page renders, when compared to design/Monopilot Design System/quality/other-screens.jsx:57-114, then it has parity with the prototype on structure (filter row with plan_type/level/aql Selects + Create custom button + 8-col Table in declared order), visuals (shadcn Table/Select/Badge/Button only), and interaction (Create custom button visible only to quality_lead/admin) — verified by RTL plus parity checklist in pipeline_inputs.details
3. Given a non-quality_lead caller, when the page renders, then the Create custom button is hidden

pipeline_inputs.description: Create v_inspection_backlog view + build sampling plans config page; parity with sampling_plans prototype.
pipeline_inputs.details: Migration creates v_inspection_backlog (per §9.2). Page lists seeded plans with filter Selects. Create custom button role-gated. shadcn primitives only.
out_of_scope: Do not implement custom plan editor (P2)
Do not modify sampling_plans schema (T-031 owns)
acceptance_criteria: Given migration 0123 applied, when SELECT FROM v_inspection_backlog runs, then the view returns rows with status IN (pending,assigned,in_progress) and computed urgency column with values in {overdue,urgent,normal} per §9.2 logic

Given the page renders, when compared to design/Monopilot Design System/quality/other-screens.jsx:57-114, then it has parity on structure (filter row with plan_type/level/aql Selects + Create custom button + 8-col Table in declared order), visuals (shadcn primitives only), and interaction (Create custom button visible only to quality_lead/admin) — verified by RTL plus parity checklist in pipeline_inputs.details
Given a non-quality_lead caller, when the page renders, then the Create custom button is hidden
test_strategy: RED: write apps/web/src/components/quality/sampling/__tests__/samplingPlans.test.tsx asserting view, parity structure, role-gated button
Run 'pnpm --filter db migrate && pnpm --filter web test samplingPlans'
risk_red_lines: Do not allow non-quality_lead to view custom-plan editor
Do not skip RLS on listSamplingPlans
